property: The deeper you descend, the higher you climb—visitors enter through a cellar but emerge atop a mile-high spire
The bridge appears 100 feet long but takes three days to cross on foot, regardless of pace
A statue visible from any point in the surrounding wasteland, yet impossible to approach closer than a league
All rooms share the same doorway—which door you enter depends on the emotion you carry
Submerged in a black lake, yet its interior remains dry and sounds echo as if in open air
Its beacon illuminates only things that no longer exist, revealing phantom ships and dead cities
Casts seven shadows from a single light source, each pointing toward a different grave
Objects dropped in fall upward into a starless sky that exists only within the shaft
Physically rotates to always face away from whoever is looking at it
Appears two-dimensional from every angle except when viewed through a corpse's eyes
